stemHtml: To minimise the risk of hydroplaning during landing the pilot should…

options.a: use normal landing-, braking- and reverse technique.
options.b: postpone the landing until the risk of hydroplaning no longer exists.
options.c: use maximum reverse thrust, and should start braking below the hydroplaning speed.
options.d: make a “positive” landing and apply maximum reverse thrust and brakes as quickly as possible.
